mapper.select: SELECT t.classification_id, SUM( LEAST(CAST(h.browse_duration AS UNSIGNED),3600)/3600 + IF(o.id IS NULL,0,2) ) AS weight FROM b_user_thing_history h LEFT JOIN b_order o ON h.user_id = o.user_id AND h.thing_id = o.thing_id LEFT JOIN b_thing t ON t.id = h.thing_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t.classification_id
